title: Arg Distribution Analysis
key_finding: At depth <= 5: ALL complex EML₁ values have Im = -pi (exactly). So arg(z) = -pi for all complex z. eml(real, z_complex) gives Im = pi > 0. This IS reachable — so Im = pi WILL appear at depth 6+. SB (Im <= 0) will be VIOLATED at depth 6!
prediction: Im = pi will appear at depth 6 via eml(real, complex_arg_neg_pi)
